symptom: Client throws ConnectTimeout when connecting to specific IP addresses on port 80
cause: The underlying anyio backend was not properly handling the timeout propagation for connect calls.
fix: Updated the connect loop to respect the overall timeout context and raise ConnectTimeout instead of TimeoutError.

symptom: Connection pool leaks when using AsyncClient with stream() and not calling response.aclose()
cause: Streaming responses kept the connection open in the pool until garbage collected.
fix: Added a warning when responses are not closed and ensured the connection is returned to the pool properly.

symptom: HTTPX incorrectly encodes query parameters containing square brackets like ?foo[bar]=baz
cause: The url encoder was quoting square brackets which are valid delimiters in some frameworks.
fix: Modified the QueryParams encoder to preserve unquoted square brackets.
